sqlMap.select: select * from ITServicesSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ITServicesSupp(ITServiceCategoryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey RevenuesFromLastYear EstimatedRevenue IsAnnually ) values (#ITServiceCategoryKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #RevenuesFromLastYear# #EstimatedRevenue# #IsAnnually# )
sqlMap.select: select RevenuesFromLastYear, EstimatedRevenue, IsAnnually, ITServiceCategoryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ITServicesSupp where ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ITServicesSupp set
RevenuesFromLastYear = #RevenuesFromLastYear# RevenuesFromLastYear = null EstimatedRevenue = #EstimatedRevenue# EstimatedRevenue = null IsAnnually = #IsAnnually# IsAnnually = null
where ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ITServicesSupp where ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ITServicesSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
sqlMap.select: select RevenuesFromLastYear, EstimatedRevenue, IsAnnually, ITServiceCategoryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ITServicesSupp where ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ITServiceCategoryKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, RevenuesFromLastYear, EstimatedRevenue, IsAnnually from ITServicesSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ITServiceCategoryKey = #ITServiceCategoryKey#
